name: Fix SPDX double-suffix
description: Repair SPDX-License-Identifier strings with a duplicated `-or-later` (or `+`) suffix (rhodibot regex-regression class ERR-LIC-001).
replacement: Collapse the duplicate suffix back to a canonical `-or-later`

discovery.root_cause: Deployed rhodibot replace rule applies `s/AGPL-3.0/AGPL-3.0-or-later/` without a word-boundary anchor; files already carrying `-or-later` get the suffix duplicated.
